comments.body: @mtrmac @rhatdan PTAL. I got upset by the `vndr` hiccups and wanted to that for a longer time. CI is now green.
LGTM, But we need  a way to extract the man pages out of containers/image for distribution in the rpm spec.

> LGTM, But we need a way to extract the man pages out of containers/image for distribution in the rpm spec.

That's not possible with `go mod`. IMHO this should be solved on the packaging level (e.g., having multiple sources in the `.spec`).

> > LGTM, But we need a way to extract the man pages out of containers/image for distribution in the rpm spec.
> 
> That's not possible with `go mod`. IMHO this should be solved on the packaging level (e.g., having multiple sources in the `.spec`).

The last conversation around that has been in #645 ; I can’t see any progress in the last month.
@lsm5 FYI, `skopeo/vendor` no longer contains `registries.conf` and c/image man pages.
